title: Verify your users’ identity documents
excerpt: Create sessions and collect identity documents. This article has multiple variants. Fetch one of the following URLs to view specific content for your use case: - [Modal](https://docs.stripe.com/identity/verify-identity-documents.md?platform=web&type=modal) - [Redirect](https://docs.stripe.com/identity/verify-identity-documents.md?platform=web&type=redirect) - [New Integration](https://docs.stripe.com/identity/verify-identity-documents.md?platform=ios&type=new-integration) - [Migrate from web](https://docs.stripe.com/identity/verify-identity-documents.md?platform=ios&type=migrate-from-web)
